description_long: This is a rectangular, utilitarian fence constructed from what appears to be wood, featuring a simple geometric design. The fence consists of two sturdy vertical posts at each end, connected by two horizontal rails at the top and bottom. Between the rails, diagonal braces form triangular patterns, adding structural stability and a subtle visual interest. The surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, typical of untreated or lightly finished wood. The overall appearance is functional and minimal, suitable for use in urban parks, sidewalks, or as a boundary in residential or public spaces. There are no visible decorative elements or gate mechanisms integrated into the structure.
description: A simple, rectangular wooden fence with two horizontal rails and diagonal braces forming triangles, finished in a matte gray tone.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thin edge of the fence, with no visible rails or braces.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the rectangular frame, two horizontal rails, and diagonal braces forming triangular patterns.
description_view_2: Another narrow side profile, identical to view 0, showing only the thin edge of the fence.
description_view_3: A rear view nearly identical to the front, showing the same rectangular frame and diagonal bracing.
